subject: refactor(composables): extract useTagInput, usePagination, formatDateForDisplay
body:
Extract duplicated logic into reusable composables:

- useTagInput: tag input with keyboard nav, autocomplete from tagCache +
  known tags, blur/debounce handling. Replaces ~70 lines duplicated in
  TransactionEditModal and ImportStepReview.
- usePagination: currentPage, totalPages, paginatedItems, resetPage.
  Replaces ~15 lines duplicated in TransactionTable and ImportStepReview.
- formatDateForDisplay: ISO date string to locale display format.
  Replaces duplicate formatDate/displayDate in TransactionTable and
  TransactionEditModal.
- BottomSheet: use useDialogA11y instead of inline Escape handler,
  gaining focus trapping and focus restoration for consistency with
  all other dialogs.

Tags: cleanup, composables, a11y
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: tailwind-migration
Semver: patch
